name: dvm_monthly
_note: The methodology v2.2 DVM/momentum screen. Screens on Durability>50, mcap 500-50000cr, P/E <= 2.5x sector, promoter pledge < 20%, trend (>50 & >200 DMA), liquidity (ADTV>=10cr), excludes Banking & Finance. NOW ranks by the true 7-factor percentile blend (rank_blend) rather than single roc125: RS 25, abs-momentum 15, vol-adj momentum 15, ADX 10, volume 10, entry-timing(RSI) 15, quality(Piotroski) 10. Because the universe FILTER uses a fundamental (durability) this stays a LIVE-SIGNALS strategy (run on /signals) - a historical backtest is gated to NaN before the snapshot by design (data-readiness verdict: live-only). RS and quality blend factors are also fundamental and blank-tolerant in the blend.
